chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITA No.918 of 2000 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For Hearing of Case. ---------------------------- 20.04.2017. Syed Riazuddin, advocate for the respondent. Syed Nooruddin Ahmed, Legal Coordinator, FBR, Karachi. >><< Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the appellant-department, which is taken on record. The instant Income Tax Appeal was admitted for regular hearing on 30.01.2001. At the very outset, the learned counsel for the respondent states that question proposed in the instant Income Tax Appeal stands covered by the decision given by a Division Bench of this Court in Income Tax Appeals No.916/2000 and 917/2000 pertaining to the same assessee and he has also placed copies of the said decisions. Learned counsel for the appellant has affirmed the situation. We, therefore, in view of the above facts and circumstances dispose off the instant Income Tax Appeal in the same manner as decided in Income Tax Appeals No.916/2000 and 917/2000. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
